description: Intake list for VIN automation requests submitted via Power Apps

columns.name: RequestedBy
columns.description: User who submitted the VIN check

columns.name: RequestedDate
columns.description: UTC timestamp when request was created

columns.name: Status
columns.description: Current processing status of the request

columns.name: RunId
columns.description: GUID generated by cloud flow to correlate all log entries for this run

columns.name: Notes
columns.description: Free-text notes from the requesting user

permissions.endUsers: ReadOnly — submit via Power App only
